name: Pulsar
author: Lyle Mills
description: Windowed tone bursts move from sparse impulses to clustered formant rhythms with independently shaped outputs.

controls.label: Formant
controls.description: Raises the carrier ratio while respecting the audio-rate ceiling.

controls.label: Pulse width
controls.description: Changes each pulsar window from a short impulse to a broad burst.

controls.label: Clusters
controls.description: Increases the number of windows within each fundamental cycle.

controls.label: Skew
controls.description: Moves the MAIN and AUX window peaks in opposite directions.

outputs.main: Clustered sinusoidal pulsars with the declared forward skew.
outputs.aux: Offset pulsars with inverse skew and a related formant.
